metadata.title: Sneaking Through B Site to Nail a Clean Triple Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this sneaky B site push catch the enemy off guard. Timing and positioning come together for a quick triple kill. What’s your favorite site to flank on?

Share your plays below!

Got a sick flank like this? Drop your best clips in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
